news.title: Tantangan dan Peluang: Biaya, Perdagangan, dan Transformasi
news.summary: Kenaikan biaya bahan baku, eskalasi sengketa perdagangan internasional, dan tekanan untuk bertransformasi dari manufaktur kelas rendah ke kelas tinggi sedang membentuk ulang industri fastener. Artikel ini menganalisis tantangan utama dan mengungkap peluang strategis untuk pertumbuhan berkelanjutan.

news.title: UE Mulai Investigasi Anti-Dumping atas Produk Fastener China
news.summary: Pada 9 November 2007, Komisi Eropa meluncurkan investigasi anti-dumping terhadap produk fastener besi dan baja dari China. Kasus ini melibatkan lebih dari 1.700 perusahaan China dengan nilai ekspor se

news.title: Penyesuaian Kebijakan Tarif AS: Ekspor Fastener Hadapi Titik Balik Baru

news.title: WT Fasteners
news.summary: WT Fasteners adalah produsen dan eksportir terkemuka baut berkualitas tinggi, sekrup, washer, dan fastener khusus. Melayani pasar global dengan produk bersertifikat ISO sejak 2005.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Expansion anchors, wedge anchors, and chemical anchor bolts for concrete and masonry applications. Ukuran M6–M24.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Flange bolts with serrated or non-serrated washer face per DIN 6921 / ISO 1665. Ukuran M5–M24.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Full and partial thread hex bolts manufactured to DIN 931/933 and ISO 4014/4017 standards. Grade 4.8 to 12.9, sizes M4–M64.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Kekuatan Tinggi structural bolts in grades 8.8, 10.9, 12.9. ASTM A325, A490, DIN 6914 compliant.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: T-shaped bolts for T-slot profiles and structural applications. Ukuran M4–M12.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Serrated flange nuts per DIN 6923 with built-in washer face. Ukuran M5–M24.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Standar hex nuts per DIN 934 / ISO 4032. Ukuran M4–M64, grades 4, 6, 8, 10.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Nilon insert lock nuts per DIN 985 / ISO 10511. Ukuran M3–M36.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Projection weld nuts for automated welding. Square and hexagonal types.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Hand-operated wing nuts for quick assembly and disassembly.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Standar flat washers per DIN 125 / ISO 7089. Ukuran M2–M64.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Split lock washers per DIN 127 / ISO 7092. Ukuran M2–M64.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Conical spring washers (Belleville) for dynamic load applications. DIN 2093.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Square flat washers for structural applications. DIN 436.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Profesional drywall screws with fine thread for metal studs and coarse thread for wood framing. Black phosphate finish.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Pan head, hex head, and countersunk machine screws. Ukuran M1.6–M20.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Self drilling screws (Tek screws) with drill point for metal applications.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality wood screws in various sizes and materials. Suitable for woodworking, furniture assembly, and general construction.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Double end studs (stud bolts) manufactured to DIN 938/939 and ISO standards. Both ends threaded with unthreaded center section.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality threaded rods (all-thread) manufactured to DIN 975/976 and ISO standards. Tersedia dalam various materials and grades.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality cotter pins (split pins) manufactured to DIN 94 and ISO 1234 standards. Used for securing nuts, bolts, and other fasteners.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality dowel pins (parallel pins) manufactured to DIN 7 and ISO 2339 standards. Used for precise alignment and positioning.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality drop-in anchors with internal thread for concrete applications. Zinc-plated carbon steel and stainless steel options.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Heavy-duty expansion bolts ( sleeve anchors) for concrete and masonry applications. Zinc-plated carbon steel construction.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Heavy-duty wedge anchors for concrete and masonry applications. Zinc-plated carbon steel and stainless steel options.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality blind rivets (pop rivets) for one-sided installation. Tersedia dalam aluminum, steel, and stainless steel with various head styles.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality circlips (retaining rings) for shaft and bore retention. Internal and external types available.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: Comprehensive fastener assortments and kits for industrial, automotive, and maintenance applications.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality semi-tubular rivets with partial hollow shank. Lighter weight and easier to set than solid rivets.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality solid rivets in aluminum, steel, and stainless steel. Multiple head styles for structural and general applications.

items.title: WT Fasteners
items.summary: High-quality U-bolts for pipe and tube mounting. Manufactured to DIN standards with steel and stainless steel options.
